name: Boiler Ward
description: Steam pulses through old pump lines while the floor plates sweat rust and bad insulation.
detail: This used to be maintenance space. Now it feels like the district's backup throat, swallowing heat, waste, and anyone too slow to leave.

fixtures.name: pressure valves
fixtures.inspect: The valves are marked in red chalk and prayer knots. Somebody learned the hard way which ones open like murder.

fixtures.name: pump housings
fixtures.inspect: The pump housings throb like a bad heartbeat pushed through iron.

mood: The pumps are running a half-step faster than rated and the floor plates are warmer than they ought to be.
Tonight a clinic-sealed bag has been stuffed behind the third valve and nobody has named it.
The red-chalk warnings have been refreshed in the last hour by a hand that doesn't usually visit.
